data.acceptance:
- [ ] When displaying a work/gate knot with a bound lease via `kno show <knot-id>`, plain-text output includes normalized lease agent metadata (e.g., agent identifier, not lease ID)
- [ ] JSON output of the same knot includes identical lease agent metadata in an appropriate field
- [ ] Lease ID/handle never appears in plain-text output for bound-lease knots
- [ ] Lease ID/handle never appears in JSON output for bound-lease knots
- [ ] Lease knots are not displayed directly when running `kno show` on CLI or JSON surfaces
- [ ] Plain-text and JSON outputs achieve display parity—identical lease agent metadata is present in both formats
- [ ] Verify by running `kno show` on a test work knot with a bound lease and confirming metadata visibility matches spec
